creator: michael@meiszl.de
text:
Getting these Syslog Entries on every incoming mail since the last pkg updates

Jul 13 09:31:41 l3router spamd[85370]: spamd: error: Bad arg length for Socket::unpack_sockaddr_in, length is 28, should be 16 at /usr/local/lib/perl5/5.32/mach/Socket.pm line 848.
Jul 13 09:31:41 l3router spamd[85370]: , continuing

Does not seem to harm anything ("continuing"...) but obviously something is wrong now.
(did not change anything of course, just updated os and pks)
